title: Shadow Foam PVC Floor Marking Tape | Premium Vinyl Safety Marking Tape| For Warehouses, Industry, Shops | 33M Single Roll (Red, Single 50mm)
features: Available in a wide variety of colours for many applications, including floor marking & safety/hazard marking
Cost effective way to create walkway lanes or to mark out hazardous areas
Satisfies all Occupational Safety and Health Administration marking requirements
Maintains colour even when exposed to abrasion and solvents. Durable vinyl is resistant to abrasion and tearing, making this floor tape last for a long time
Tapes are waterproof and easily removable. The adhesive provides good instant adhesion on a wide range of surfaces
description: Product Description Premium PVC Floor Marking Tape For Warehouses, Industry, Shops & more... This floor marking tape is a heavy duty plasticised PVC tape. Which provides instant demarcation lines for gangways and restricted areas. Line marking tape is ideal for sports halls, warehouses, hospitals etc. Quickly lay down smooth, straight lines and get the same high visibility as painted floor markings at a fraction of the cost. Specifications Material: Polyvinyl Chloride Film Adhesive: Rubber Width: 50/75mm Length: 33M Strong Adhesive This floor marking tape is made to adhere solidly to a wide variety of floor surfaces Applications Hazard Marking Make clear and straight hazard lines with this hazard tape. It is hard-wearing so it will last through wear and tear. Aisle Marking Create aisles to ensure people are moving correctly through a specific area. The colours are bright and vivid enough to make the lines easy to spot. Production Area Use hazard tape or solid colours to create specific areas for your production area.
